summary: The patient’s presentation suggests tuberculous meningitis due to chronic symptoms including headaches and neurological deficits; thus, the characteristic CSF findings include lymphocytosis, hypoglycorrhachia, and hyperproteinorrhaea as seen in Tuberculosis infection. \(\blacksquare\)
